# Attendo

> Attendo is an all-in-one workforce management and HRMS platform for attendance, leave management, payroll, productivity, and employee operations.

## Website

- [Home](https://attendo.in/): All-in-one workforce management solution overview.
- [Features](https://attendo.in/feature/): Attendo HRMS and workforce management feature details.
- [Addons](https://attendo.in/addon/): Optional addons and integrations for Attendo.
- [Pricing](https://attendo.in/pricing/): Pricing plans for individuals, small teams, and growing organizations.
- [Sign Up](https://attendo.in/signup/): Sign-up page for Attendo plans.
- [Contact Us](https://attendo.in/contact-us/): Contact and inquiry page.

## Product Topics

- Workforce management
- Attendance management
- Leave management
- Payroll automation
- HRMS software
- Employee productivity
- Mobile HR app
- AI-assisted HR support

## Official Links

- Website: https://attendo.in/
- App: https://app.attendo.in/
- Demo: https://demo.attendo.in/
